classes.heading: YOUR DRIVING LICENSE - CAR
classes.intro: You can now get your driving license - transparent and to the point. Cars: Class B, BF17 (accompanied from 17), B197 (automatic + shifting capability) and BE (trailer). You can book first aid separately via “First Aid” in the menu.
classes.bSubtitle: Car driving license - from 18 years old.
classes.bDetail: Circuit or automatic. Registration €349 including VAT, learning app €50 including VAT, driving lessons €65 including VAT.
classes.bf17Subtitle: Accompanied driving from the age of 17
classes.bf17Detail: Same training as Class B with accompanied driving until you reach adulthood - same prices for registration, app and driving lessons.
classes.b197Detail: Practical test for automatic transmission - with proven shifting skills you can later drive a manual car. Same registration, app and driving lesson prices as with B.
classes.beDetail: For larger trailers by car: maneuvering, coupling and safe driving. Prices and duration depending on the status - we will be happy to advise you.

instructorQuiz.heading: FIND YOUR TEACHER
instructorQuiz.subheading: Three quick questions - then we'll show you a teacher. When it comes to language, only coaches who really offer it; Otherwise the suggestion happens to be from the appropriate group.
instructorQuiz.q1: What language would you like to be taught in?
instructorQuiz.q2a: Calm & patient - I need time and clear steps
instructorQuiz.q2b: Structured & quick - please tell me directly what I can do better
instructorQuiz.q2c: Relaxed & honest - learning is easier with humor
instructorQuiz.q3: What do you enjoy most about the trip? (purely for classification purposes - we offer cars B, BF17, B197, BE)
instructorQuiz.q3c: I don't know yet/I don't care
instructorQuiz.q3Hint: Tip: We select your teacher at random from all suitable driving instructors based on language - the last answers only make it more personal.

team.pageH1: The team – Mary's Driving School Mönchengladbach
team.maryoText: I love accompanying people on their way to getting a driver's license. As an experienced entrepreneur, it is important to me not only to give driving lessons, but also to create a family environment in which everyone feels welcome. At Maryo's it's about you - we want you to ride safely and happily.
team.juliusText: For me, driving school means: supporting real people and creating structure where others only see processes. We are experienced entrepreneurs who do exactly what we love - and you can feel it. Our goal: a place where everyone feels comfortable and achieves their goals.
team.lauraText: I am there for you no matter what your concerns.

faq.heading: FREQUENTLY QUESTIONS
faq.q1Q: How many driving lessons do I need?
faq.q1A: That is individual. As a rough guide, we calculate around 18 driving hours for very fast learners, ~24 on average and ~30 if you need more rest and repetition (e.g. if you are unsure). Each driving lesson costs €65 including VAT.
faq.q2Q: How much does the driving license cost in total?
faq.q2A: Registration €349 and learning app €50 (each including VAT), driving lessons €65 including VAT. TÜV examination fees (practice, e.g. approx. €250) and theory are not included in the registration. Overall, for many learner drivers, typical additional costs are often around €2,000 (quick), €2,400 (normal) or €2,800 (more practice) — depending on the driving lessons.
faq.q3Q: Can I change my preferred teacher after registering?
faq.q3A: Yes, just talk to us - we will always find a solution.
faq.q4A: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Sofort (Klarna), Klarna installment purchase and credit/debit card.
faq.q5A: Yes! You can pay in 3 installments via Klarna - without interest.
faq.q6Q: Can I be taught in German, English, Arabic or Turkish?
faq.q6A: Yes. We offer these four languages for lessons — matching the website and our instructor quiz.
faq.q7Q: What happens after you register online?
faq.q7A: We usually get back to you within 24 hours — this is our minimum standard for processing. Phone number: 0178 4557528. It's often quicker, but we can always guarantee at least this deadline.
faq.q8A: Mon-Fri from 12:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m. Bahnhofstraße 25, 41236 Mönchengladbach. Short messages & appointments: green buttons at the bottom right of the website; by phone: 0178 4557528
faq.q9Q: Can I register for BF17 / accompanied driving?
faq.q9A: Yes, from 17 years of age with a suitable accompanying person.
faq.q10Q: Is there an offer if I'm switching from another driving school?
faq.q10A: Yes. If you switch to us from another school and can show a valid training certificate (proof of training) from your previous driving school, registration with us (transfer) costs only €1. We’ll confirm details when you sign up. The learning app, driving lessons and exam fees are still charged at our regular rates — see the price calculator and Prices page.

preisePage.metaDescription: Transparent costs: registration, app, driving lessons €65, MOT & first aid explained. Maryo's Mönchengladbach driving school — with interactive price calculator.
preisePage.heading: Driving license prices in Mönchengladbach
preisePage.intro1: Whether you live in Rheydt, Wickrath or another part of the city - with us in the city center on Bahnhofstrasse you can plan your driving license with the same clear prices as all of our car driving students.
preisePage.intro2: Registration and the learning app are the start; You pay for driving lessons as needed. TÜV fees and the first aid course are separate items - so nothing remains hidden. We answer questions about job centers or funding in the FAQ.
preisePage.intro3: Use the calculator above for class B, BF17, B197 or BE and try different lesson counts — at your own pace.
preisePage.switcherOfferBody: Switching from another school to us? Registration (transfer) is only €1 if you can present a valid training certificate from your previous school. The learning app, lessons and other services are billed at our usual rates — the calculator above helps you estimate totals.
preisePage.switcherOfferFaqHint: You’ll also find this in the FAQ (filter: Prices).

fuehrerscheinPage.bMetaTitle: Driving license class B Mönchengladbach | Maryo's driving school
fuehrerscheinPage.bMetaDescription: Car class B in Mönchengladbach: training, prices, first aid, B197 & BE at a glance — Maryo's driving school Bahnhofstrasse.
fuehrerscheinPage.bLead: The classic way to get a car driving licence from 18 — with online registration, fair prices and lessons in German, English, Turkish or Arabic. Easy to reach in Mönchengladbach by public transport or car.
fuehrerscheinPage.bBodyAusbildung: You go through the theoretical training (learning app included), collect special trips and practice drives on the road and take theory and practical tests at the TÜV. How many driving lessons you need depends on the individual - after the first few trips you will receive honest feedback from us so that you can plan realistically.
fuehrerscheinPage.bBodyMG: We are there for you directly in Mönchengladbach - many students commute to us from surrounding districts or neighboring towns. Short routes to theory, clear agreements via WhatsApp or telephone and a team that knows city traffic and typical exam routes.
fuehrerscheinPage.bBodyWeitere: In addition to class B, we offer BF17 (accompanied driving from 17), B197 (automatic test with shifting skills) and BE (trailer). The first aid course is mandatory for registration and can be booked separately with us - see menu item “First Aid”.
fuehrerscheinPage.bBodyPreise: Registration €349 and learning app €50 (each including VAT), each driving lesson €65 including VAT. TÜV and first aid come on top of that - you can get the overall overview in the price calculator and in our FAQ.
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17MetaTitle: BF17 accompanied driving Mönchengladbach | Maryo's driving school
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17MetaDescription: BF17 from 17 in Mönchengladbach: accompanied driving, same car training as class B - registration, prices and process at Maryo's driving school.
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17Lead: With BF17 you start practicing earlier - the training essentially corresponds to class B until you turn 18, accompanied by a suitable person on the street. We will accompany you through the formalities and the driving lessons - here in Mönchengladbach.
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17BodyAusbildung: You complete the required special and overland journeys as for class B and then practice in accompanied mode. The accompanying person must meet the legal requirements - we will be happy to explain what these are to you personally so that nothing goes wrong.
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17BodyMG: You will practice city traffic, roundabouts and typical situations in Mönchengladbach in a structured manner with us. So you are prepared - regardless of whether you are driving to school, to work or to the neighboring town later.
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17BodyWeitere: After coming of age and successfully passing the test, you will have a regular car driving license. At the same time, you can also find out about B197 or BE from us if you later want an automatic with switching option or a trailer.
fuehrerscheinPage.bf17BodyPreise: The same transparent rates apply to registration, app and driving lessons as for class B - calculate your scenario in the price calculator. Funding via job centers or employment agencies is generally possible if your authority approves it; You can find details about this in the FAQ.

registration.heading: REGISTRATION
registration.idDocDrop: Select photo or store it here

registration.idDocPrivacy: We store the images in encrypted form in our system only to check your registration (Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR). No disclosure to third parties unless required by law.
registration.paymentSessionStale: The payment session is invalid. Please select “Start payment” again.
registration.paymentExplainer: Process: (1) Check data and accept terms and conditions. (2) With “Login & Pay” the secure Stripe window opens. (3) There you choose your payment method - e.g. E.g. Card, Apple/Google Pay, Klarna (installments/immediate, depending on availability in your Stripe account). (4) The €399 covers registration + learning app; You pay driving lessons and TÜV fees separately according to the terms and conditions/price list. You activate Klarna & Co. in the Stripe dashboard under payment methods.
registration.referrerCodeHint: Did a friend refer you? Enter his code here - he will receive a €15 Amazon voucher after your payment.
registration.referralCodeSuccessHint: Share it with friends. As soon as someone registers with your code and pays, you will receive a €15 Amazon voucher.

fineFlash.title: Fine check
fineFlash.speedIntro: Enter the limit and measured speed - the result is updated immediately (orientation, not legal advice).
fineFlash.toleranceLabel: Subtract measurement tolerance (3 km/h to 100 km/h, above 3%)
fineFlash.toleranceHint: Usual approximation of measurement uncertainty — your decision may differ.
fineFlash.afterTolerance: According to tolerance: effective {adjusted} km/h (deduction {ded} km/h)
fineFlash.noViolation: No excess according to this calculation.
fineFlash.banConditional: Approximately {months} ​​month(s) — often only when repeated within 12 months; Check individual cases
fineFlash.otherIntro: Choose a scenario - we are happy to help with orientation for MPU or advanced seminars.
fineFlash.leadBody: We do not provide legal advice - contact us if you need guidance on next steps or your driving training.
fineFlash.disclaimer: No substitute for legal advice or fine notices. Amounts according to the catalog of fines (see above for status). If in doubt, a lawyer or authority.

alcohol_low.title: 0.5 to less than 1.1 ‰ (alcohol)
alcohol_low.desc: misdemeanor; Driving ban and points possible; Advanced seminar (ASF) can be arranged - see notice.

alcohol_mid.title: 1.1 to less than 1.6 ‰
alcohol_mid.desc: Increased penalties, driving ban; MPU often prescribed. Legal help please.

alcohol_high.title: From 1.6 ‰ or heavily intoxicated
alcohol_high.desc: crime; High penalties, MPU, driver's license revocation possible - lawyer or authority.

alcohol_refusal.title: Alcohol test refused
alcohol_refusal.desc: Serious consequences; MPU often topic. Obtain legal advice.

drugs.title: Drugs behind the wheel
drugs.desc: Depending on the case, a felony or administrative offense; MPU and driving ban often.
